scripts.build:all: pnpm check:install && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/contracts build && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/card-markdown build && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/domain build && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/api build && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/cli build && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/web build && docker compose build
scripts.start: pnpm check:install && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/contracts build && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/cli build && docker compose up -d --build
